title: Jamaican Smoked Chicken and Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky chicken, flaky dumplings, and a hint of Jamaican spices.
instructions: Bring chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add Jamaican seasoning and stir to combine.
Add smoked chicken and cook until heated through.
Roll out flaky dumplings and cut into quarters.
Add dumplings to the pot and cook for 10-12 minutes.
Shred cheddar cheese and sprinkle on top of dumplings.
Optional: Serve with additional Jamaican seasoning and cheddar cheese on the side.
